---
title: "Introduction to Korean Labor Institute Panel Study(KLIPS)"
description: "A summary slide on KLIPS(in Korean)"
# date: "2025-03-01"
toc: false
categories:
  - Data
---



- [Data Summary: KLIPS(Korean Labor Institute Panel Study)(KOR)](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sjom2vvamipv6i4009vvg/klips_wypark_public.pdf?rlkey=ztmymtq4jdu2ojlrb3dp1nfdq&dl=0)
- For the  English description of the data, please check the other slides [here](../cnef/index.html).
